content.speakerText: Hi, thanks for coming in today. I'm Dr. Reynolds, chair of the scholarship committee.
content.speakerTextCn: 嗨，谢谢您今天来，我是奖学金委员会主席雷诺兹博士。
expectedAnswers: Nice to meet you, Dr. Reynolds. I'm Alex Chen. Thank you for this opportunity.
Hello Dr. Reynolds, I'm Alex. I really appreciate you taking the time to meet with me.
Hi, I'm Alex Chen — thanks so much for having me today. I'm honored to be here.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否礼貌回应并完成自我介绍
语言准确性：语法正确，用词恰当，无中式英语
表达自然度：语气真诚、不生硬，符合口语习惯
关键词覆盖：使用了 'thank you', 'opportunity', 'I'm' 等关键表达

content.speakerText: How's your day going so far? Any trouble finding the building?
content.speakerTextCn: 今天过得怎么样？找楼费劲吗？
expectedAnswers: It's been good, thanks! I found it easily — the campus is stunning.
Pretty well! I got turned around once, but a friendly student pointed me in the right direction.
Not bad at all. The signs were clear, and I enjoyed walking around the grounds.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否正面回应并适当补充信息
语言准确性：使用恰当的动词短语如 'got turned around', 'pointed me in the right direction'
表达自然度：语气轻松、真实，避免机械背诵
关键词覆盖：使用了 'thanks', 'found', 'signs', 'student' 等场景词汇

content.speakerText: Welcome to our campus! Did you have a good trip here?
content.speakerTextCn: 欢迎来到我们的校园！你旅途顺利吗？
expectedAnswers: Thank you! It was a long flight, but I arrived safely and I'm so excited to be here.
Yes, everything went smoothly. I even had time to enjoy the scenery on the way.
Great, thanks! I was a bit nervous, but the journey helped me get ready for today.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否积极回应并表达感谢与期待
语言准确性：使用恰当的时态和连接词，如 'but', 'even'
表达自然度：语气真诚，有个人情感流露，非模板化
关键词覆盖：使用了 'thank you', 'trip', 'journey', 'excited' 等关键词
